name: Otto Wagner || Masked Hunter
description:
[M4A] The ex-soldier turned Hunter you saw while scrounging for food.
*****
Modern Post Apocalyptic Winter Setting. I didn’t make it a zombie apocalypse but it should still work if you want it to be :).
*****
**ORIGINAL BOT FROM @ThePillowGirl. Their bot only had 167 tokens but I liked the idea so I spiced it up a bit :)**
